prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon preparation with carbohydrate loading for endurance performance

solution_criteria: Total daily caloric intake meets or exceeds 3000 calories
Carbohydrates comprise at least 60% of total calories
Meal plan includes exactly 3 meals and is presented in compact format
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 3000+ calorie intake with carbohydrate loading focus

prompt_inputs.goal: Lean muscle maintenance for boxing competition while staying under 2000 calories

solution_criteria: Meal plan is exactly 1 day and includes 3+ meals
Total daily calories do not exceed 2000
All meals are dairy-free and whole food based
Plan maintains adequate protein for athletic performance
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport that requires weight management (boxer/wrestler) creating a lean meal plan under 2000 calories while maintaining performance

prompt_inputs.goal: Muscle gain with protein-focused meal distribution

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains 5-6 meals distributed throughout the day
Total daily protein is at least 1.6g per kg of body weight (136g minimum)
Protein is evenly distributed across meals (roughly 20-30g per meal)
Plan is presented in compact, concise format suitable for one day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength-training athlete (bodybuilder) emphasizing protein distribution across 5-6 meals throughout the day

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals and snacks for one day
All meals contain complete plant-based proteins with complementary amino acids
Plan includes iron, B12, calcium, and omega-3 rich foods appropriate for vegan athletes
Caloric intake and macronutrient distribution supports muscle gain and endurance goals
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a vegan/plant-based athlete requiring complete protein sources and micronutrient optimization without animal products

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle and improve athletic performance

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4 meals/snacks distributed throughout the day
All meals are gluten-free, dairy-free, and nut-free with no cross-contamination risks
Provides adequate protein (approximately 1.6-2.2g per kg body weight) to support muscle building
Includes balanced macronutrients and micronutrients despite dietary restrictions
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an athlete with multiple dietary restrictions (gluten-free, dairy-free, nut allergy) ensuring nutritional completeness despite limitations
